title: Validating Structured JSON
scenario: A company has a JSON object containing information about its products, including product ID, name, description, and price. The goal is to validate the JSON object against a predefined schema, specifically checking for the presence of all required fields and their correct data types
constraints: Must use a JSON schema validation library
Must include error handling for invalid JSON

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the JSON object adheres to the predefined schema
Check if the code handles errors correctly for invalid JSON
Check if the code is syntactically correct
